title: Thai-Style Cheesy Tagine
description: A twist on traditional Thai cuisine, this cheesy tagine combines the creaminess of cheese with the rich flavors of the tagine. Serve as a side dish or add to your favorite Thai meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add curds and cook until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add molten cheese and stir until melted.
Add egyptian cheese and stir until combined.
Serve hot, garnished with additional tagine spice blend if desired.
